description: The Ministry of Health requires a configuration update for the 'PHU Monthly 1 - Morbidity (Old)' dataset. Add a new Data Element named 'Prostate Screening [Task]' (aggregate positive integers, 'Gender' category combination) to the dataset. Include this data element in a new form section named 'NCD Screening [Task]' and configure the form to disable the 'Female' field for this data element.
